title: [MTR] DOCTOR YELLOW T4/T5
description: Doctor Yellow T4/T5 addon for Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
This addon for Minecraft Transit Railway adds the Doctor Yellow T4 and T5 (Class 923) diagnostic train to the game.

The train features realistic interiors, viewports to observe the pantographs and more!

By default, doors do not open at stations due to the nature of this train (but do in some circumstances- read below).

All seven cars are provided. Additionally, the following variations are included:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- CAR 1 :
  - Special version featuring the "ありがとうT4" message on the windows, commemorating T4's end of service.
- CAR 7 :
  - Special version featuring the "ありがとうT4" message on the windows, commemorating T4's end of service.
  - Special versions (T4/T5) for visitor tours with opening doors and open curtains

</details>

**[Check out my other Shinkansen packs!](https://modrinth.com/collection/jzC7uozr)**

Enjoy!

![Dr Yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0c1688302195315687b90c036e0331c5c32106a.jpeg)
